arts.ttl: Six free agents Spurs can sign in 2025 including Arsenal target and star striker
arts.sum: A great opportunity to sign players on a free transfer, Postecoglou and Spurs could even potentially secure cut-price deals in January if they wanted to bring in the player at the start of the year rather than wait until the summer. Jonathan Tah is set to leave Bayer Leverkusen on a free transfer next summer as things stand and he would bring plenty of experience to Tottenham.

arts.ttl: Rodrigo Bentancur keen ‘to help team’ after ban – Spurs boss Ange Postecoglou
arts.sum: The Uruguay midfielder’s last domestic match was on November 10.

arts.sum: Nottingham Forest wing back Ola Aina has named who he thinks is the best player in the Premier League during a guest appearance on football podcast Filthy Fellas.

arts.ttl: Every word Ange Postecoglou said on why Tottenham need January transfers but the right players
arts.sum: And since Nuno's got in from the back end last year, you could tell that, you know, they were all sort of now playing in a way I think that suited them. Ange Postecoglou held a Christmas Eve press conference ahead of Tottenham's trip to Nottingham Forest in the Premier League on Boxing Day and we've got a full transcript from it.

arts.ttl: Tottenham's James Maddison touchingly reveals best Christmas present he ever asked for
arts.sum: Tottenham star James Maddison has named the "weirdest" Christmas present he ever asked for, admitting he once told his parents he wanted them to get him a little brother

arts.ttl: Richarlison, Moore, Bentancur - Latest Tottenham injury news and return dates for Nottingham Forest - football.london
arts.sum: "We’re kind of hoping Ben Davies, Mikey Moore and Richarlison aren’t too far away after that, but, for Thursday, it’s probably just Destiny and Rodrigo [Bentacur]." What Postecoglou has said: "Richarlison potentially first week of the new year."

arts.ttl: Three players who could leave Tottenham in January as Ange Postecoglou plots key transfer moves
arts.sum: Tyrese Hall could possibly be a candidate to head out of the club on a temporary basis in January. Sergio Reguilon failed to secure a move away from Tottenham in the summer and now he has the opportunity to move on in January.
